Order Custom Backdrop Stand Hardware for Professional Event Displays

This large banner frame (Slider) is a great alternative to standard pop up backwall displays. The Backdrop Slider Stand Hardware can adjust from an 81" to 120" width & 41.5" to 96" height display. Pole pockets are sewn on top and bottom of the fabric print. The frame is constructed out of 1.5" telescopic poles that slide, allowing multiple graphic sizes to be used on the display.

Frame Color: Black

Package Includes:

  • (1) Single Sided Graphic
  • (2) 4 1/2" Pole Pockets (Top and Bottom)
  • (1) Large Slider Frame
  • (1) Black Nylon Carry Bag

Upgrade option: Add 2 additional pole pockets to sides

Warranty: 1 Year on Frame

Other Features:

  • Display Size: 96"W x 96"H
  • Graphic Size: 96"W x 94"H
  • Shipping Size: 41" x 5" x 4"
  • Banner Materials: Stretch Fabric, Dye-Sublimation
  • Weight: 16 lbs

Backdrop Stand Hardware Artwork Requirements & File Specifications

Ensure optimal print quality for your Backdrop Slider Stand Hardware graphics with proper file preparation:

File Format Requirements

  • Preferred formats: PDF, AI, PSD, EPS
  • High-resolution JPEG or PNG acceptable
  • Vector files preferred for text and logos
  • CMYK color mode for accurate color reproduction

Artwork Dimensions

  • Standard graphic size: 96" wide x 94" high
  • Resolution: 150 DPI minimum at full size
  • Include 0.5" bleed on all edges
  • Keep important text and graphics 1" from edges

Design Considerations

  • Account for 4.5" pole pockets at top and bottom
  • Consider viewing distance when sizing text
  • Use high-contrast colors for maximum visibility
  • Stretch fabric material accommodates minor distortion

File Submission

  • Upload files directly through our online system
  • Email large files to our prepress department
  • Free proof provided before production
  • Design assistance available upon request

Color Matching

  • Dye-sublimation printing provides vibrant colors
  • Pantone color matching available
  • Color proof available for critical color requirements
  • Monitor calibration affects color perception

Frequently Asked Questions About Backdrop Stand Hardware

What are the size limitations for the Backdrop Slider Stand?

The frame adjusts from 81" to 120" in width and 41.5" to 96" in height. The recommended graphic size is 96"W x 94"H to accommodate the pole pockets and ensure proper fit.

How much does the complete backdrop system weigh?

The entire system including frame, graphic, and carry bag weighs approximately 16 pounds, making it easy to transport to trade shows and events.

Can I use different sized graphics on the same frame?

Yes, the telescopic design allows you to use multiple graphic sizes on the same frame. The adjustable poles accommodate various dimensions within the frame's specifications.

What's included with my backdrop stand order?

Your order includes: (1) single-sided graphic, (2) 4.5" pole pockets sewn top and bottom, (1) large slider frame, and (1) black nylon carry bag. Additional pole pockets can be added to the sides as an upgrade.

How long does production take?

Production times range from 1-5 business days depending on your selected turnaround time. We offer money-saving options for longer production times if you're not in a rush.

What file formats do you accept for artwork?

We prefer vector files (PDF, AI, EPS) or high-resolution raster files (PSD, JPEG, PNG). Files should be 150 DPI minimum at full size with 0.5" bleed on all edges.

Can you print double-sided graphics?

Double-sided graphics are available as a custom option. Contact our customer service team for pricing and specifications for double-sided backdrop displays.

What's the warranty on the frame?

All backdrop stand hardware comes with a one-year warranty on the frame components. This covers manufacturing defects but does not include normal wear and tear.
